title: Command with Undo
description: Implement a 'Command' interface with 'execute' and 'undo'. Create a 'TextInsertCommand' that appends text to a buffer and undoes it.
test_script:
import unittest
from command import TextInsertCommand
class TestUndo(unittest.TestCase):
    def test_undo(self):
        buf = ['a']
        cmd = TextInsertCommand(buf, 'b')
        cmd.execute()
        self.assertEqual(buf, ['a', 'b'])
        cmd.undo()
        self.assertEqual(buf, ['a'])
